name: byd-vehicle-scrape
description: Scrape BYD vehicle configuration and pricing data and convert it to MySQL SQL.

interface.shortDescription: Scrape BYD vehicle data and generate SQL.
interface.longDescription: Collect BYD Australia vehicle configuration and pricing data, save it as JSON, and generate MySQL INSERT statements.
defaultPrompt: Scrape the latest data for BYD Atto 2.
Generate SQL from the scraped BYD vehicle data.
Scrape configuration and pricing for these BYD models.
